revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-525

That part of a radio system by means of which radio-frequency energy is carried from the transmitter to its antenna.

Examples Single wire, balanced multiwire, coaxial cable, coaxial line, waveguide etc.

{{IALAFooter}}
